content: Magno Fernando da Fonseca (GitHub: magnocat) is the Executive Director of MagnoCat Tecnologia, a company based in Artur Nogueira, SP, Brazil, focused on technology solutions. He uses the alias 'ongam odnanref acesnof' (his reversed name). He is an experienced developer with over 98 repositories on GitHub and has a background in Computer Science and Scouting (Escotismo). He is the verified user/owner of this system.
